caption: A bald man wearing a dark navy blue suit, a white dress shirt, and a dark tie is being interviewed on a sports field. He is positioned in front of a blurred background of red stadium seating and a green grass pitch. He speaks into a blue and white microphone featuring a circular logo with a crown on top and a stylized "C" in the center. In the upper right corner of each scene, a white Real Madrid crest is visible. Another individual is partially seen on the left edge of the frame. As the sequence progresses, the man’s facial expressions shift slightly as he talks, moving from a slight smile with his mouth open to a more serious, focused expression. The camera remains static in a medium close-up shot, capturing his movements and the consistent placement of the microphone in front of him.
